MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-16-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THERE IS NO OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION. DEFENDANT IS TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AS AUTHORIZED BY CCP 708.020 AND 708.030 ON OR BEFORE JUNE 6, 2013. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A MONETARY SANCTION TO PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $300 ON OR BEFORE JUNE 6, 2013 FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND AND/OR TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING SAID FAILURE. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARRI BONAPART, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Plaintiff FUND RECOVERY SERVICES, INC.'S Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery and for Award of Monetary Sanctions is Granted. There is no opposition to the motion. Defendant is to provide verified responses without objections to Plaintiff's Post Judgment Interrogatories and Demand for Production of Documents as authorized by CCP 708.020 and 708.030 on or before June 6, 2013. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that Defendant shall pay a monetary sanction to Plaintiff in the sum of $300 on or before June 6, 2013 for failure to respond and/or to meet and confer regarding said failure. Judge Pro Tem: BARRI BONAPART, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)
